use_cases: Form submission triggers with configurable variants for primary and secondary actions
Interactive UI buttons with size, shape, and type customization for design systems
Loading state management for async operations with spinner integration
Icon buttons with prefix/suffix support for toolbar and navigation contexts
Disabled state handling for conditional form workflows
ai_summary: A versatile React Button component with multiple size variants (tiny to large), type variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, error, warning), and shape options (square, circle, rounded). Features hover states, loading spinner support, disabled state handling, and shadow options. Styled with Tailwind CSS for easy integration into design systems and modern web applications.
